ops.title: cc-steer instrument card v1 — sentinel-AUC noise floor, MDE, judge calibration
ops.body:
# cc-steer Instrument Card v1 — sentinel-AUC noise floor, MDE, judge calibration

Date: 2026-07-19. Sources: E15 (noise floor + MDE; independently CONFIRMED by the E15Y cross-check, own code/seeds/B=20000), E16 (judge bias audit — early return, control arms only), E17 (golden-set judge calibration replicate), E18 (vote-cache reliability model). Supersedes note b35bae5 ("unmeasured instrument"). Canonical files: `/Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/instrument-card-v1.md` + machine-readable sidecar `instrument-card-v1.json` (E19 harness keys `mde` / `mde_golden` / `minimum_detectable_effect` / `stopping.mde`).

Instrument under test: sentinel-AUC — `cc_steer/retrain/sentinel.py::checkpoint_auc` (sklearn `roc_auc_score` on fire = 1 − P(NO_STEER)), plus the LLM triage/panel judges that produce its labels.

## 1. Headline instrument defects

1. **The deployed pairwise panel judge is a constant/degenerate decider (E17).** Prior E17 run: STAY_SILENT on all 30 golden rows; fresh E8-independent replicate: TPR 1/15 = 0.067, FPR 1/15 = 0.067 — Youden's J = 0.00 both runs. At J = 0 Rogan–Gladen is undefined and prevalence is **non-identifiable at any n**. Direct impact: any retrain promotion gate wired through `judged.py::panel_labels` is currently uninformative — it passes or fails on noise. Fix the panel judge before any golden-panel-gated promotion.
2. **No comparative AUC verdict in the P6 sweep was resolvable (E15).** Entire arm spread (0.9229–0.9371 = 0.0142) sits inside the noise band (unpaired MDE 0.0453 at n=628). The b35bae5 Δ0.0009 rejection was under-powered by 1–2 orders of magnitude (0.02× MDE).
3. **The judge is not run-to-run stable (E17).** Test–retest, byte-identical prompt/model/seed, same 30 contexts: pointwise Cohen's kappa 0.29 (TPR 0.333 → 0.067), pairwise kappa 0.00. TPR/FPR are not fixed parameters.
4. **Judge perturbation-robustness (length/position/style bias) is UNMEASURED** — E16's six perturbation arms never ran.

## 2. Variance components (fixed checkpoint)

Scorer is deterministic, no seed; b35bae5 checkpoint AUC reproduced exactly (0.9316896744944222) by both E15 and E15Y. `[xchk …]` = E15Y's independent B=20000 re-estimates, +0.2–2.3% above E15's B=2000 values, within MC noise, explicitly NOT defects; no verdict moves.

| Component | n=628 watcher | n=1325 gate |
|---|---|---|
| Row-sampling SE (bootstrap) | 0.00996 [xchk 0.01001] | 0.00665 [xchk 0.00671] |
| Analytic cross-checks | Hanley–McNeil 0.01029, DeLong 0.00998 (exact) | Hanley–McNeil 0.00661 |
| Label-noise SE flip / drop | 0.00562 [xchk 0.00566] / 0.00338 | — |
| **Total marginal SE (additive)** | **0.0114** (exact 0.011432) | **0.0076** (exact 0.007637) |
| Total marginal SE (joint MC) | 0.0101 [xchk 0.0103] | — |

Dominant: row-sampling; the **293-negative minority class is the bottleneck in both frames** (E15Y verified the 293 gate negatives ARE the 293 watcher negatives). Not decomposed: training/run-to-run variance — b35bae5's identical-recipe band 0.0146 (0.9326 vs 0.9180) includes retrain stochasticity E15 did not isolate.

## 3. MDE (alpha 0.05, power 0.80; MDE = 2.8016 × SE_delta)

| Comparison | MDE |
|---|---|
| **n=628 watcher, unpaired** | **0.0453** (exact 0.045293; E15Y B=20000 recompute 0.0456, flagged, no verdict change) |
| n=1325 gate, unpaired | 0.0303 |
| n=628 paired, rho=0.9 / rho=0.99 | 0.0143 / 0.0045 (requires BOTH arms' per-row probs + paired DeLong) |
| **Golden panel ~57 rows (accuracy)** | **0.123** ≈ 7/57 rows (derived v1) |

mde_golden derivation: judge-replicate noise only, per-row binomial flips at E15's pairwise is_steering disagreement d=0.0583 → per-measurement SE = √(d(1−d)/57) = 0.0310; two-arm MDE = 2.8016·√2·0.0310 = 0.123; one-sample variant 0.087 (~5 rows). Assumes independent flips at the pooled rate (flips actually concentrate by category); corroborated same-order by E16 control (binary flip 0.075 at N=80).

## 4. Judge calibration

- **E15 (opus triage ×5, 72 rows, fresh clones):** Fleiss kappa 0.878 (is_steering) / 0.849 (category); 12.5% rows non-unanimous; mean pairwise disagreement 0.058; pooled positive→noise flip 0.177 — by category: direction 0.00, premature 0.00, style_violation 0.05, wrong_approach 0.10, unwanted_action 0.40, incorrect_change 0.66. All confirmed exactly by E15Y.
- **E16 control (sonnet, N=80 ×2):** binary flip 0.075 ± 0.029; category flip 0.125 ± 0.037; positives 54 vs 48; flips concentrate in the ambiguous-directive cluster.
- **E18 (4456 opus votes, 1623 items, v4/v5/v6):** Fleiss 0.79/0.73; ICC 0.78; **irreducible noise floor 3.6%**; observed 15.0% flip is ~80% systematic v5→v6 drift (196 up/16 down, McNemar p=1.5e-40; v4↔v5 symmetric p=0.90). Never pool cross-prompt-version votes as replicates.
- **E17 TPR/FPR + n=30 sufficiency:** pairwise panel TPR 0.067 / FPR 0.067 / J=0.00 (degenerate); pointwise TPR 0.067 / FPR 0 / J=0.067, Newcombe CI [−0.14, 0.30] ∋ 0. Corrected-prevalence 95% half-widths at pipeline scale: pointwise 0.45/0.49/0.50 at pi=0.1/0.2/0.4; pairwise uninformative (hw 0.50). **n=30 NOT sufficient**; required-n unpinnable under run instability (n≈8 vs n≈54 at pi=0.1). Sizing: ≥60 rows/stratum (120) moderate prevalence, ~180/stratum (360) at pi≈0.5, K=3–5 repeat votes/row, fix the panel judge first. Gold caveat: human labels.json absent; gold = design-intent strata.

## 5. Bias factors: UNMEASURED

E16 completed 2 of 8 passes (controls only); length/position/style ×2 never ran (disk-verified no-run). No factor can be declared over/under the 5pp threshold. Banked finding: the >5pp flag rule sits at/below the control noise floor (7.5% binary, 12.5% category at N=80) — any completion needs N→160 or ×3 replicates. Completion ~$5.4–6.

## 6. Unreliable strata (E18)

v6 cat=direction is the unstable stratum (n=129, flip 0.91, kappa −0.21, 98% drift-up; worst: L1_short n=35 flip 0.97 kappa −0.34), driven by v6 reclassifying operational_directive→direction (90 items) — a **definition question E19 must adjudicate; more voting cannot resolve it**. Secondary: repo=yclaw (flip 0.37; its 5 E13 proposals warrant re-judging), repo=dailies (0.28), incorrect_change L1_short (0.29). E20 caveat: only the 44-item irreducible-noise set is label noise, not all 478 frontier flips. Row lists: `/Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E18-vote-reliability/out/`.

## 7. Re-classification of past verdicts

UNDER-POWERED: b35bae5 P6 Δ0.0009 (0.02× MDE; needs rho ≥ 0.9996 + a paired DeLong never run — only one probs vector persisted); sweep 9b vs 8b 0.0070 (rho ≥ 0.976); 9b vs incumbent 0.0054 (rho ≥ 0.986); 8b vs 4b 0.0039 (rho ≥ 0.993); best-vs-worst 0.0142 (rho ≥ 0.902) — the whole P6 arm ranking is unresolved. SOUND, unchanged: fresh-epoch promotions with no incumbent (v002@0.9317, v001@0.8534), E9 sign-test p=1.0 (correctly null), E7 fired-count gates, E11 prose AUC ≤ 0.6 coarse gate. Cross-check scope: E15Y confirmed every rho-needed value exactly but could not recompute the sound_unchanged set (data outside its artifacts) — those stand on E15 only.

## 8. Forward decision rule

A sentinel-AUC delta is ACTIONABLE only if BOTH hold: (1) a 95% CI on the delta excludes zero — computed as a paired DeLong test over both arms' persisted per-row probabilities on the identical eval frame; if either arm's per-row probs were not persisted, use the unpaired SE from this card's variance components; AND (2) |delta| >= the frame's MDE — 0.0453 on the n=628 watcher frame, 0.0303 on the n=1325 gate frame; when a measured pairing correlation rho is available from persisted per-row probs, the paired MDE applies instead (0.0143 at rho=0.9, 0.0045 at rho=0.99). A delta failing either condition is instrument noise: report it as "within noise floor (MDE <frame value>)", never as a win, a loss, or a rejection. Golden-panel accuracy deltas (~57 rows) are actionable only at |delta| >= 0.123 (~7/57 rows), and not at all through the deployed pairwise panel until its constant-decider defect (J=0) is fixed. INTERIM RULE (verdicts measured before this card): any comparative verdict whose |delta| < the applicable MDE is reclassified UNDER-POWERED — neither confirmed nor refuted; do not build on it, and re-measure under this rule if the decision still matters. Non-comparative gates (fresh-epoch promotion with no incumbent, fired-count sanity gates, coarse AUC <= 0.6 floors) remain valid.

Enabling change (highest leverage): persist BOTH checkpoints' per-row probs and compute paired DeLong — the only rigorous way to resolve deltas < 0.03 on these frames. Variance attack: expand the 293-negative pool; harden the judge on incorrect_change/unwanted_action.

## 9. Open gaps

(1) bias factors unmeasured (E16 arms never ran; power bump needed); (2) deployed panel judge degenerate J=0 — fix `panel_labels` before golden gating; (3) golden human labels absent; (4) paired-DeLong blind spot — only one arm's probs persisted today; (5) training/run-to-run variance not decomposed (b35bae5 band 0.0146); (6) 293-negative bottleneck caps MDE; (7) mde_golden is a derivation, not a measurement; (8) judge run instability (kappa 0.29) taints single-pass calibrations; (9) E15Y cross-check has no cc-notes ledger (disk workspace only).

## 10. Sources

E15 log `83e31ca286275ecf47e6c512c4faab01754709b6` (~$11); E15Y `/Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E15Y/out` ($0, CONFIRMED); E16 log `10ed7d87051a81332636b6d825f0bda9996cc542` (~$2.9 sunk + $0); E17 log `67cbc63d` + memo on task `cc17e0c` (~$3.5); E18 log `93db96beb020bde743bb025da27bb2f677809442` ($0); this card: log `384378de36d3b3f207359438b622c984beab01ba`. Supersedes `b35bae5d0bb27014c92e549b4e1e0e62c46c6f45`.
